title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Queen, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Big Mom, Unknown person #12 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think of big mom... as a wild boar!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's just going to run a lap through upon! She'll be back here soon enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He did it! He got her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Long live the queen! The Savior of Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the-?! My head hurts! What am I doing here?! Oh, that's right... I fell into the ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and got separated from everyone. Then... I went to some dirty little village...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why won't you fall, you old coot?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're Kaido's Lockey. Queen, was it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're finished! There's no way! She's a monster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her whole vibe's changed! What the hell hap-pened?!.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 26 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
